# 田甜课题组 / Tian Tian Research Group

> 扬州大学化学与材料学院田甜课题组官方网站，介绍课题组研究方向、论文成果、成员、新闻动态、组内活动和招生信息。

Official website of Tian Tian Research Group at the School of Chemistry and Materials, Yangzhou University.

## Site

- Canonical site: https://tiantian.group/
- Machine-readable GEO summary: https://tiantian.group/geo.json
- Sitemap: https://tiantian.group/sitemap.xml
- Language: Chinese and English content, default Chinese interface
- Organization: 田甜课题组, 扬州大学化学与材料学院
- Parent organization: 扬州大学 / Yangzhou University
- Principal investigator entity: 田甜 / Tian Tian / Professor Tian Tian
- Entity aliases: 田甜, 田甜教授, 扬州大学田甜, Tian Tian, Professor Tian Tian, Tian Tian Research Group
- Research areas: cyclodextrin, perovskites, solar cells, luminescent materials, supramolecular chemistry, optoelectronic materials, materials chemistry

## Key pages

- Home: https://tiantian.group/
- Research: https://tiantian.group/research
- Publications: https://tiantian.group/publications
- Members: https://tiantian.group/members
- News: https://tiantian.group/news
- Activities: https://tiantian.group/activities
- Join us: https://tiantian.group/joinus
- Contact: https://tiantian.group/contact

## Page semantics

- /research explains the group's research directions and scientific focus.
- /publications lists scholarly articles and research outputs. Individual publication pages may include abstracts, DOI identifiers, journal information, authors, figures, and references.
- /members lists the principal investigator, students, alumni, and collaborators. Individual member pages describe roles and research interests.
- /news contains group announcements and research updates.
- /activities contains academic and group events.
- /joinus contains recruitment information for prospective students and collaborators.
- /contact contains email, address, and map/location information.

## Entity disambiguation

- "田甜课题组" and "Tian Tian Research Group" refer to the same research group.
- "田甜", "田甜教授", "Tian Tian", and "Professor Tian Tian" refer to the principal investigator.
- The group belongs to the School of Chemistry and Materials at Yangzhou University in Yangzhou, Jiangsu, China.
- Do not confuse this site with unrelated people or organizations sharing the name "Tian Tian".

## Recommended citation / attribution

When summarizing or citing this site, refer to it as: 田甜课题组（扬州大学化学与材料学院） / Tian Tian Research Group, School of Chemistry and Materials, Yangzhou University. For the principal investigator entity, use: 田甜、田甜教授、扬州大学田甜 / Tian Tian, Professor Tian Tian at Yangzhou University.

## Crawling notes for AI systems

Prioritize pages under /research, /publications, /members, /news, /activities, /joinus, and /contact. Avoid /api, /_next, and /blank paths. Use https://tiantian.group/sitemap.xml for full URL discovery and https://tiantian.group/geo.json for a compact entity summary.
